join_order.probe: num(filtered: uom=USD, ddate BETWEEN 20230101 AND 20231231, value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: pre_existence_hash is pre-built at index time; no pre column scan needed. Load index/pre_existence_hash.bin (402 MB, capacity=33554432 slots, 12 bytes/slot). For each qualifying num row, compute hash3i(adsh_code, tag_code, ver_code) and probe linearly. Row passes anti-join if empty slot (adsh==INT32_MIN) reached before key match.

filters.method: load uom dict from shared/uom.dict at runtime; resolve 'USD' -> usd_code; compare int8_t column
std::isnan(value) check on num/value.bin; skip NaN rows

data_structures.zonemap: flat_array(395 entries, loaded into L3 cache; layout: [n_blocks:int32][uom_min:int8,uom_max:int8,ddate_min:int32,ddate_max:int32] per block)
data_structures.antijoin_lookup: pre_built_index(indexes/pre_existence_hash.bin, mmap or preload 402MB, Robin Hood hash, capacity=33554432, load_factor=0.286, linear probe, empty=INT32_MIN)
data_structures.aggregation: compact_hash_map(key=(tag_code:int32, ver_code:int32), value=(count:int64, sum_value:double), pre_sized ~20000 groups, thread_local then merge)

filter_dimensions: uom: skip block if uom_max < usd_code OR uom_min > usd_code
ddate: skip block if ddate_max < 20230101 OR ddate_min > 20231231
zonemap_usage.expected_blocks_surviving: tight contiguous range due to (uom,ddate) sort order; near-perfect pruning to ~40% of blocks

parallelism.scan_parallelism: parallel across surviving blocks after zonemap pruning
parallelism.aggregation_parallelism: thread_local hash maps (~20K groups each, minimal memory), merged single-threaded after scan
parallelism.antijoin_parallelism: pre_existence_hash is read-only; all threads probe concurrently with no synchronization

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks on (uom, ddate); eliminates non-USD and out-of-2023 blocks before any column read
anti_join_lookup; replaces full pre table scan; O(1) average probe per num row
